heading: Definitions; treatment of references to provisions in part C
label: 1395w–151 Definitions; treatment of references to provisions in part C

children.heading: Basic prescription drug coverage
children.label: 1 Basic prescription drug coverage
children.text: The term “basic prescription drug coverage” is defined in .section 1395w–102(a)(3) of this title

children.heading: Covered part D drug
children.label: 2 Covered part D drug
children.text: The term “covered part D drug” is defined in .section 1395w–102(e) of this title

children.heading: Creditable prescription drug coverage
children.label: 3 Creditable prescription drug coverage
children.text: The term “creditable prescription drug coverage” has the meaning given such term in .section 1395w–113(b)(4) of this title

children.heading: Part D eligible individual
children.label: 4 Part D eligible individual
children.text: The term “part D eligible individual” has the meaning given such term in .section 1395w–101(a)(3)(A) of this title1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Fallback prescription drug plan
children.label: 5 Fallback prescription drug plan
children.text: The term “fallback prescription drug plan” has the meaning given such term in .section 1395w–111(g)(4) of this title

children.heading: Initial coverage limit
children.label: 6 Initial coverage limit
children.text: The term “initial coverage limit” means such limit as established under for a year before 2025, or, in the case of coverage that is not standard prescription drug coverage, the comparable limit (if any) established under the coverage for such year.section 1395w–102(b)(3) of this title

children.heading: Insurance risk
children.label: 7 Insurance risk
children.text: The term “insurance risk” means, with respect to a participating pharmacy, risk of the type commonly assumed only by insurers licensed by a State and does not include payment variations designed to reflect performance-based measures of activities within the control of the pharmacy, such as formulary compliance and generic drug substitution.

children.heading: MA plan
children.label: 8 MA plan
children.text: The term “MA plan” has the meaning given such term in .section 1395w–101(a)(3)(B) of this title1

children.heading: MA–PD plan
children.label: 9 MA–PD plan
children.text: The term “MA–PD plan” has the meaning given such term in .section 1395w–101(a)(3)(C) of this title1

children.heading: Medicare Prescription Drug Account
children.label: 10 Medicare Prescription Drug Account
children.text: The term “Medicare Prescription Drug Account” means the Account created under .section 1395w–116(a) of this title

children.heading: PDP approved bid
children.label: 11 PDP approved bid
children.text: The term “PDP approved bid” has the meaning given such term in .section 1395w–113(a)(6) of this title

children.heading: PDP region
children.label: 12 PDP region
children.text: The term “PDP region” means such a region as provided under .section 1395w–111(a)(2) of this title

children.heading: PDP sponsor
children.label: 13 PDP sponsor
children.text: The term “PDP sponsor” means a nongovernmental entity that is certified under this part as meeting the requirements and standards of this part for such a sponsor.

children.label: A
children.text: under a policy, contract, or plan that has been approved under ; andsection 1395w–111(e) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: by a PDP sponsor pursuant to, and in accordance with, a contract between the Secretary and the sponsor under .section 1395w–112(b) of this title

children.heading: Qualified prescription drug coverage
children.label: 15 Qualified prescription drug coverage
children.text: The term “qualified prescription drug coverage” is defined in .section 1395w–102(a)(1) of this title

children.heading: Standard prescription drug coverage
children.label: 16 Standard prescription drug coverage
children.text: The term “standard prescription drug coverage” is defined in .section 1395w–102(b) of this title

children.heading: State Pharmaceutical Assistance Program
children.label: 17 State Pharmaceutical Assistance Program
children.text: The term “State Pharmaceutical Assistance Program” has the meaning given such term in .section 1395w–133(b) of this title

children.heading: Subsidy eligible individual
children.label: 18 Subsidy eligible individual
children.text: The term “subsidy eligible individual” has the meaning given such term in .section 1395w–114(a)(3)(A) of this title

children.heading: Application of part C provisions under this part
children.label: b Application of part C provisions under this part

children.text: any reference to an MA plan included a reference to a prescription drug plan;
any reference to an MA organization or a provider-sponsored organization included a reference to a PDP sponsor;
any reference to a contract under included a reference to a contract under ;section 1395w–27 of this titlesection 1395w–112(b) of this title
any reference to part C included a reference to this part; and
any reference to an election period under were a reference to an enrollment period under .section 1395w–21 of this titlesection 1395w–101 of this title
